base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mountain_tileset — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Mountain (Worlds 3/6) — cliff-platforms, waterfalls. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
